raw_consumer_statement:
I was wrongfully charged by XXXX and promptly filed a dispute on XX/XX/XXXX. 

American Express denied my dispute. When I called, they asked for only written documentation, even though all of my communications with XXXX were over the phone. They refused to investigate further and to ask XXXX about the phone and in-person communications they had with us which were fraudulent -- XXXX purposefully hid how much our final charge would be. Our phone call with XXXX, on XXXX ' recorded line, should have reflected XXXX agreeing to charge us only {$180.00} and promising us it would show up on my credit card statement in 7 business days. That did not happen. 

American Express does not protect its consumers and refuses to fulfil its fiduciary duty to investigate. They accept the merchant 's receipt as sufficient, completely ignoring the fact that we were charged MORE than expected on the receipt and were told otherwise by the merchant.
